lines: Mori-san, accounting says you flagged something in the Fourth Ledger? Word of advice: unflag it. People who read that ledger get promoted to "missing".
You're still alive! Don't take this wrong, but there was a betting pool.
Overtime again. The lights in this district never turn off. Neither do we. We just… dim.
Did the crossing signal just… blink backwards? I need sleep. Or less sleep. One of the two.
